sigWerErrors.reason: 'hesap' (account) is replaced with 'behzat' (a Turkish name), which completely changes the meaning and makes the sentence incoherent.

'istediğim' (that I wanted) is replaced with 'henüz' (yet), which changes the nuance but the main intent of the sentence remains understandable.
